hero.subtitle: From the first hello to the final delivered gallery — here's how we work together.

processIntro.title: How we move from idea to image.

process.title: We talk first
process.body: Before anything else, a slow conversation — over a call or coffee — about who you are and what this moment actually means to you.

process.title: We shape the day
process.body: I send a simple plan: timing, light, locations, the small details that quietly make or break a shoot. You stay in charge; I stay prepared.

process.title: We shoot, gently
process.body: On the day I'm calm, kind, and slightly invisible. I direct only when you need it — the rest is observed, never forced.

process.title: We edit with intention
process.body: Every image is hand-edited in a consistent, timeless tone. No filters, no trends — just frames that should age well.

process.title: We deliver, beautifully
process.body: A private online gallery within 3–5 weeks, plus print-ready files and a thoughtfully prepared keepsake set.

weddings.title: Documentary-first, never disruptive.
weddings.body: A wedding is a long, emotional, unrepeatable day. My job is to hold it gently — to be everywhere the moments are and nowhere the moments aren't. I shoot with two cameras, three lenses, almost always available light, and a quiet presence that lets the day stay yours.

items: I plan the photography timeline with you so the day flows.
I scout light and locations in advance — never on the fly.
I direct softly when needed, observe quietly when not.
I deliver fast: sneak peeks within a week, full gallery in 3–5.

cta.text: If this sounds like the way you'd like to be photographed,
cta.label: Start a conversation
